expansionRoadmap.goal: Expand OBD2HQ from a P-code focused library into a verified P/C/B/U diagnostic encyclopedia without publishing unverified code meanings.
goldAcceptanceCriteria: Meaning must come from a verified diagnostic reference or a reviewed manufacturer-specific source note.
Each locale must have a natural title, meta description, plain-language explanation and FAQ copy.
Each code must include symptoms, likely causes, first checks, diagnostic steps, safe-to-drive guidance, related codes and repair verification.
Manufacturer-specific or ambiguous codes must clearly state that exact meaning can vary by make and must link to vehicle-specific pages.
No code is added to sitemap until it passes duplicate title, mojibake, thin-content and schema checks.

nextVerifiedDataBatches.focus: chassis, ABS, steering, suspension, brake system codes
body, airbag, climate, lighting, restraint and comfort system codes
network, CAN bus, lost communication and module communication codes

recommendation: Runtime Gold fallback now prevents thin code pages for existing records.
Next data-expansion phase should add verified C, B and U code families, then enrich raw records so fallback use trends toward zero.
Sitemap should continue exposing only indexable, canonical pages with working hreflang.
